message:
Simplify provider execution

Call provider capability methods directly instead of building intermediate operation plans. Derive supported tools from the adapter methods and remove the duplicate provider capability registry.

This keeps the external tool/config surface unchanged while trimming provider glue and updating tests for the direct execution path.
